subject: [PATCH v4 07/21] mm: create scaffolds for the new virtual swap implementation

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: No review comments provided in the initial message.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new virtual swap implementation, starting with the creation of scaffolds in mm/vswap.c and modifications to mm/swap_state.c, Makefile, and MAINTAINERS. The goal is to set up a framework for virtual swap space management.
